nodes.name: Replay Entry
nodes.notes: Contract B: 05-dlq-replay re-injects the failed event here with replay:true + the original correlation_id, bypassing the webhook response + idempotency gate.

nodes.name: Is Replay?
nodes.notes: Replay re-runs a known event on operator demand: skip the webhook response + idempotency gate (which would dedupe it as already-seen) and go straight to provisioning.

parameters.jsCode:
const p = $('Gen Correlation + Normalize').first().json;
return [{ json: { tenant_id: p.tenant_id, correlation_id: p.correlation_id } }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "id": {{ JSON.stringify($('Gen Correlation + Normalize').item.json.tenant_id) }},
  "name": {{ JSON.stringify($('Gen Correlation + Normalize').item.json.tenant_name) }},
  "plan": {{ JSON.stringify($('Gen Correlation + Normalize').item.json.plan) }},
  "region": {{ JSON.stringify($('Gen Correlation + Normalize').item.json.region) }},
  "status": "active"
}

parameters.text:
=✅ *Tenant onboarded*
{{ $('Resolve Policy').item.json.tenant_name }} ({{ $('Resolve Policy').item.json.plan }}) provisioned.
Entitlements: {{ $('Grant Entitlements').item.json.granted }} applied.
Correlation: `{{ $('Gen Correlation + Normalize').item.json.correlation_id }}`

nodes.name: Is Authorized?
nodes.notes: Public Stripe webhook calls must carry a valid Stripe-Signature for STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET. Replay entries are in-process and trusted.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'error', message: 'unauthorized', reason: $('Gen Correlation + Normalize').first().json.auth_error || 'invalid Stripe signature' }) }}
